titleStmt.title: SII 17.558: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 558. (A.R. No. 515 of 1904.) KĪVAḶŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Akshayaliṅgēśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., 18th year, Dhanus ba. 8, Sunday, Hastam, correspond to 1163 A.D., December 20, Friday (not Sunday) ·79; ·20.

This inscription records the grant by purchase of land called Śendāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ-kollai situated in Śāttaṅguḍi, a hamlet of Periyālattūr alias Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam for rearing a garden for god Kēḍili-nāyaṉār by Śrīmūlattāṉam-uḍaiyāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ of Kuravaśēri worshipping god Tiruvārūr-uḍaiyār in Tiruvārūrkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu and Āvuḍiyāḷchchāṉi, wife of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr Viṉāyaka-bhaṭṭaṉ, a devotee of this same god. The latter is stated to have had the former as her guardian (mudukaṇ). Provision was also made for the residence of the āṇḍār tending the garden.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Om svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu dhanunāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum nāya
ṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ keyamāṇikkavaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvārūr kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruvāruruṭaiyārai pūcikkum kuravaceri cimula
ttāṉa muṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ināyaṉārai pūcikkum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr viṉāyakapaṭṭaṉ pirāma
ṇi Āvuṭaiyāḷaccāṉiyum Iviruvom Uṭaiyār keṭilināyaṉārkku nāṅkaḷ tirunanta vaṉam ceyya viṭṭa puṉceykkellai Ā
vatu periyālattūrāṉa kṣattiriyacikāmaṇiccaturvvetimaṅkalattup piṭākai cāttaṅkuṭikaṭṭaḷai yil māttūr kiḻavar kāṇiyai I(ru)pperuvilai ko
ṇṭa kuravaceri civalokanāyakapaṭṭaṉum tūyavāmaṉapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ koṉaippaṭṭaṉ pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ kollaiyum Ittirunantavaṉam ceyyum Āṇ
ṭārkaḷukkuk kuṭi Irukka Ūṭum Ivūr ṟkkaṭaiya koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Āḷum Araiyar Ūṟṟukkeṇikku vaṭakku Uttecapaṭi maṉai kuḻi Irupattañcum Ippaṭi Uḷḷapaṭi kollaiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.558 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
